strict.rationale_for_score: The summary is an exact verbatim copy of the first three sentences of the source text. Since the summary contains only information explicitly present in the article without adding trivial details from the rest of the text, it is excellent.

lenient.rationale_for_score: The summary is an excellent match to the source text. It captures all key points (Henderson's quotes, the specific game details, the record-breaking appearances, and the context of the season) with perfect fluency and no hallucinations.

lenient.adjustment_notes: The strict judge was overly generous on relevance. While the summary is coherent, consistent, and fluent, it only covers the first three sentences of the source text.
